{{Quote|You should speak with Sordaan Xris at the hunting camp. He's the self-proclaimed leader of the Rodian hunters.|[[Kerssoc]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG" />}}
'''Sordaan Xris''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG" />

==Biography==
Xris established [[Sordaan Xris' Safari Partners]]<ref name="CSWE" /> and what became known as the [[Rodian Hunting Grounds]], which offered big-game hunting on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. He used the [[Bocctyyy]] sub-region of Etyyy as his personal hunting grounds, and often made wagers with fellow hunters pertaining to feats performed within Bocctyyy.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sordaan Xris appeared as a non-player character in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
